subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build the target in the build root (SYMROOT)

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Remove build products and intermediate files from the build root (SYMROOT)

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Test a scheme from the build root (SYMROOT)

subcommands.name: archive
subcommands.description: Archive a scheme from the build root (SYMROOT)

globalOptions.name: -destination
globalOptions.description: Use the destination described by DESTINATIONSPECIFIER

globalOptions.name: -configuration
globalOptions.description: Use the build configuration NAME for building each target

globalOptions.name: -arch
globalOptions.description: Use the architecture ARCHITECTURE for building each target

globalOptions.name: -sdk
globalOptions.description: Use SDK as the name or path of the base SDK when building the project

globalOptions.name: -showsdks
globalOptions.description: Display a comprehensive list of all installed SDKs

globalOptions.name: -showBuildSettings
globalOptions.description: display a list of build settings and values

globalOptions.name: -list
globalOptions.description: List the targets and configurations in a project, or the schemes in a workspace

globalOptions.name: -allowProvisioningUpdates
globalOptions.description: Allow xcodebuild to communicate with the Apple Developer website
